questionHtml:
Which statements are correct for electrolysis?

I.   An exothermic reaction occurs.
II.  Oxidation occurs at the anode (positive electrode).
III. The reaction is non-spontaneous.

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which statements are correct for electrolysis? I. An exothermic reaction occurs.II. Oxidation occurs at the anode (positive electrode).III. The reaction is non-spontaneous. A. I an
